name: FNF DJX: “A party always needs music”
description:
WE NEED MOMEY

The three cast of characters here seem to not have to money to fund X’s DJ career, so they need some money for better equipment and such, so when an party needed an DJ, what better time than for them to reserve it and reap the rewards, only problem, they need a new song

(If you like fnf bots like this, feel free to comment them down below in the comments, I know not many people know this mod fs)
creator: Lilithness
